title: Fluffy Savory Canadian Egg Frittata
description: A savory Canadian dish featuring tahini paste, perfect for a brunch mood, this lacto-vegetarian-friendly frittata is a delicious and satisfying meal.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 375 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, whisk together the eggs, tahini paste, milk, salt, and black pepper until well combined.
Add the shredded cheddar cheese, diced bell peppers, and chopped onion to the bowl and stir until the vegetables are evenly distributed.
Pour the egg mixture into a 9-inch round baking dish or skillet and smooth the top.
Place the baking dish into a larger pan and add hot water to come halfway up the side of the dish to create a bain-marie.
Bake the frittata for 35-40 minutes, or until the edges are golden brown and the center is set.
Remove the frittata from the oven and let it cool for a few minutes.
Sprinkle the chopped fresh parsley over the top of the frittata, if using.
Slice the frittata into wedges and serve hot.
